hero.title: Classic style,
hero.description: At Mauri Barber we take care of every detail of your haircut and beard, right in the heart of Barcelona. Book your appointment on WhatsApp and come try it out.

services.title: Everything your look needs
services.description: Haircuts, beard grooming and shaves for every style.
services.priceNote: * Reference prices, subject to confirmation with the barber.

gallery.title: Our work
gallery.description: A look at some of our recent work.

historia.title: Mauricio, barber and stylist
historia.paragraph: Originally from São Paulo, Brazil, Mauricio has more than 20 years of experience as a barber and stylist, specializing in men's and women's haircuts. He combines classic and modern techniques to offer a personalized service, with close, friendly treatment and quality results tailored to each client's style.

items.name: Ronaldo
items.text: I've been getting my hair cut by Mauricio since his previous barbershop, and I'm glad he didn't move far. He's an excellent barber with great attention to detail.

footer.credit: Made and designed by Klent Creative

whatsapp.message: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment

cookieBanner.message: We use the Google Maps embed in the contact section, which may set its own cookies. Vercel Analytics, which we also use, does not use cookies.

mapFallback.message: You declined Google Maps cookies, so we haven't loaded the interactive map.

sections.heading: 1. Identification details
sections.body: In compliance with the information duty set out in Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSICE), the following details are provided: this website is owned by Mauricio Felipe de Lima, Tax ID Z2267706A, registered address at Carrer de Bilbao 38, 08005 Barcelona, contact email mauriciubcn@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 2. Purpose
sections.body: This legal notice governs the use of the website mauribarber.com ("the website"), owned by Mauri Barber / Mauri Studio, whose activity is providing barbershop and hairdressing services.

sections.heading: 3. Terms of use
sections.body: Access to this website is free and does not require prior registration. Using the website implies full acceptance of the terms set out in this Legal Notice.

sections.heading: 4. Intellectual property
sections.body: All content on this website (text, images, logos, design) is the property of Mauricio Felipe de Lima or of third parties who have authorized its use, and is protected by intellectual and industrial property law.

sections.heading: 5. Third-party links
sections.body: This website may contain links to third-party services (WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Maps). The owner is not responsible for the content or privacy policies of such services.

sections.heading: 6. Governing law
sections.body: Any dispute related to this website shall be governed by Spanish law, with jurisdiction lying with the courts of the owner's domicile.

sections.heading: 1. Data controller
sections.body: Mauricio Felipe de Lima, Tax ID Z2267706A, address at Carrer de Bilbao 38, 08005 Barcelona, email mauriciubcn@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 2. Data we process
sections.body: This website has no contact form or user registration. The only data that may be processed are: (a) anonymous, aggregated browsing data through Vercel Analytics, without cookies or personal identification; (b) if you message us on WhatsApp, your phone number and message content are handled directly within the WhatsApp app, under Meta/WhatsApp's own privacy policy.

sections.heading: 3. Purpose
sections.body: Analytics data is used solely to understand aggregate website usage and improve the browsing experience. No profiles are built and no data is shared with third parties for commercial purposes.

sections.heading: 4. Legal basis
sections.body: The controller's legitimate interest in the statistical analysis of the website.

sections.heading: 5. Retention
sections.body: Aggregated analytics data is retained according to Vercel Analytics' own policy.

sections.heading: 6. Recipients
sections.body: No data is shared with third parties except where legally required. The map provider (Google Maps) and the analytics provider (Vercel) are technology providers acting as data processors.

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
sections.body: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction, and portability by writing to mauriciubcn@gmail.com.

sections.heading: 8. Complaints
sections.body: You may file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD, www.aepd.es) if you believe your rights have not been properly addressed.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies?
sections.body: Cookies are small files stored in your browser when you visit a website.

sections.heading: 2. Cookies we use
sections.body: This website does not set any cookies of its own. If you accept the interactive Google Maps embed in the contact section, Google may set its own cookies under its own privacy policy. If you decline or don't accept, the map will not load and a link to open the location directly in Google Maps will be shown instead.

sections.heading: 3. Vercel Analytics
sections.body: We use Vercel Analytics to understand aggregate site usage. This service does not use cookies or store personal identifiers.

sections.heading: 4. Managing your choice
sections.body: You can change your choice at any time by clearing your browser's browsing data, which will make the cookie banner appear again.

sections.heading: 5. More information
sections.body: For more information about Google's cookies, see Google's privacy policy at policies.google.com/privacy.
